name: KAMEN RIDER RPG
description:
WE DID IT RIDERS, WE HAVE REACHED 10K MESSAGES!!

"We're Human so what's important is to learn what went wrong."

"Henshin!"

No matter who you were—hero chasing justice, dark rider haunted by bad choices, villain seeking redemption, monster raging against the world, or just a secondary kicking in the background—your past doesn’t lock the belt.

You dreamed, you fought, you protected something (or someone), even when your path veered wrong. But the moment you plant that right foot, rev the engine, and decide to shield smiles and crush evil… you transform.

In this endless web of Rider Worlds—yours, mine, or some wild spin-off that crashes into Precure or Sentai—you become the Kamen Rider you were always meant to be.

Henshin. Ride on. Keep the foot on the right side.

Hiya! If you're reading this then I hope you like this Kamen Rider RP project. It's funny to think that the reason that I started watching it (My First Kamen Rider being Wizard) was, because of that damn meme of Wizard (The washing machine and the other one were he was on the bed sleeping with a Sentai hero?). Kamen Rider as whole it's gas (⁠ ͡⁠°⁠ᴥ⁠ ͡⁠°⁠ ⁠ʋ⁠). Honestly, I consider myself inexperienced in this about creating bots, but, I hope it peaked your interest (As a Fan or not in Tokukatsu to its entirety).

I had this thought searching through Chub and Janitor, and thought: "The urge of making a KR bot was calling to me". Plus, I was watching Kabuto and said "why not?".

I will keep updating the bot, but for a beginners entry preferably just creat your own Rider World to not make it that complicated. I will take any advice and recommendation to improve the bot. Sidenote: [Images are not of my property. This isn't for profit. Just hope to make a call for all Riders in the world to have fun with their own Rider Worlds.]

NEW NOTE: HAPPY HOLIDAYS! I Was off to the beach and there was no signal so I was off like for two days lol. Now THIS is my last update for this RPG, scenario as whole. Not because I will stop, just because I think since now the bot can only take until Gavv (going furthermore would just get confused and I tried my best....). Other thing is, the bot as of now has been growing and I'm happy bout it, keep doing it riders! My first ever bot.
creator: Maed_OS
